message:
feat(tui): adaptive status-bar with semantic truncation engine (br-1xt0m.1.3.2)

Replaces the monolithic status line renderer with a priority-based segment
planner. Each segment carries a StatusPriority (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
that maps to terminal width breakpoints (always/60+/80+/100+). Narrower
terminals gracefully degrade by dropping low-priority information first.

- StatusPriority enum + StatusSegment struct for declarative composition
- plan_status_segments() computes left/center/right segment groups
- render_status_line() renders with proper centering and padding
- push_key_hint_spans() extracts styled key-hint parsing to helper
- Duplicate error-only counter dropped when full counters are visible

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
